title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: Will Scott explains how design systems and context engineering guide intelligent agents in software design. The discussion covers how MCP and AI agents work together to build consistent, correct applications with structured design guidance.
writeup: Will Scott walks through how design systems and context engineering steer AI agents during software design, with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) connecting agents to structured design guidance. The session shows how MCP and agents work together so generated applications stay consistent and correct. The core takeaway: feeding agents explicit design system rules, rather than leaving choices open, produces output that conforms to established standards.
